hero.subtitle: I architect, integrate, and operate production AI platforms — from unified gateways routing across providers to vertical apps in healthcare, commerce, and enterprise. End-to-end, in production, with the methodology to back it.

about.title: An integrator, not a slide deck.
about.p1: I'm Aharon Bensadoun, AI Solutions Architect. I help organizations move from 'we should do something with AI' to live systems serving real users — without the consultancy theater.
about.p2: My work spans hospitals running oncology trial matching, dental SaaS doing AI radiology, marketplaces with AI-generated catalogs, and an internal AI gateway (AI Nexus) routing across Azure OpenAI, AWS Bedrock, Whisper and Gemini for governed enterprise use.
about.p3: I write code, deploy infrastructure, and stay on call until it works.
about.video_caption: Short intro — what I do and how I work.

services.title: How I help companies adopt AI.
services.subtitle: Four ways I plug into your org. Pick one or stack them.

gateway.title: AI Gateway Architecture
gateway.desc: One unified API for your AI: provider routing, fallback, streaming, auth, quotas, audit. The pattern I built as 'AI Nexus' — adapted to your stack.

integration.title: Custom AI Integration
integration.desc: Embed AI inside your existing systems (ERP, EHR, CRM, e-commerce). Patient screening, document analysis, voice transcription, image generation — wired into real workflows.

methodology.title: AI Methodology Adoption
methodology.desc: Help your team shift from prompt-tinkering to engineering: evals, versioned prompts, observability, cost controls, and a delivery cadence that ships.

fullstack.title: End-to-end Product Build
fullstack.desc: From zero to deployed product: .NET / Node backends, React frontends, PostgreSQL, cloud (Azure/AWS/GCP), CI/CD, monitoring. AI-native by default.

1.title: Diagnose, don't pitch
1.desc: I start by mapping where AI realistically moves the needle in your business — not where it makes a nice demo.

2.title: Ship small, fast, real
2.desc: First production slice in weeks, not quarters. Real users, real data, measured outcomes.

3.title: Govern from day one
3.desc: Auth, audit logs, encrypted secrets, fallbacks, cost monitoring. Production AI requires production discipline.

4.title: Transfer the knowledge
4.desc: Your team takes the wheel. I document, train, and step back — engagement ends when you don't need me.

demos.title: See the systems in action.
demos.subtitle: Four flagship applications — AI Nexus, Eva Medical AI, OncoMatch, and Koli — with walkthrough videos so you can evaluate the portfolio without a live session.

projects.title: Production AI systems, real users.
projects.subtitle: A subset of what I've built. Each shipped to production with auth, monitoring, and paying or institutional users.

contact.title: Let's talk about your AI roadmap.
contact.subtitle: Whether you're scoping a first AI pilot or scaling an existing system — pick a channel.

footer.tagline: AI Solutions Architect - building production AI systems.
